title: Research Library
description: Our free research library is the largest curated collection of reproductive medicine studies available to patients. Expanding it requires ongoing researcher time, database access, and enrichment tools.

title: RRM Academy
tagline: No ads, no paywalls — keep it that way
description: Running a nonprofit educational platform has real costs: hosting, software, content development, and clinical expertise. General funding keeps everything free and accessible to every patient.

title: Video Library
tagline: Educational videos for every learning style
description: We want to build a comprehensive video library of patient education content — condition explainers, procedure guides, and clinical insights presented in an accessible format.

title: Production & Awareness
tagline: Better equipment, original content, wider reach
description: Reaching more patients means investing in production quality — cameras, lighting, editing, original graphics, and the infrastructure to distribute content at scale.

title: The Live Show
tagline: We want to launch a live show — help make it happen
description: Dr. Whittaker has a vision for a live show covering reproductive health, patient stories, and the latest in RRM research. Your support makes the first season possible.
